tool.name: hash_identifier
tool.description: Identify hash types and suggest cracking approaches.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Identify hash algorithm from hash value - Analyze hash characteristics (length, charset, prefix) - Get cracking tool recommendations (hashcat, john) - Assess hash security strength - Detect bcrypt, argon2, PBKDF2, and other modern hashes

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The identification action: - identify: Identify possible hash types - analyze: Analyze hash characteristics - suggest_crack: Get cracking suggestions and tools

returns.description: Hash identification results with type matches, security level, and cracking tools

tool.examples:
# Identify hash type
identify 5f4dcc3b5aa765d61d8327deb882cf99
# Analyze hash characteristics
analyze $2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMy
# Get cracking suggestions
suggest_crack $6$rounds=5000$salt$hash
